version_description: Correct placing of chords and uses the correct A#dim chord where others just used an A7.

versions.version_description: Fixed a few incorrect chords and improved formatting.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Heartache Tonight by The Eagles

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]

Heartache Tonight, [/tab]
